video_details.title: How a Pro Trader Thinks - $MULN Layup Trades Dissected!
video_details.description:
Alright Gang! Due to popular demand, I dissected last week's opportunities in MULN as I would do with my trainees. This is the type of analysis and dissection pro traders do.

Improved audio, new pic-in-pic recording, but YES I know I cut off the right side of the screen! We got a major first-timer over here :) 

One step better audio and visual each time I hope.

#stocks #trading #daytrading #daytrader
